channel.title: Informer on Chen Kai Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Informer on Chen Kai Blog

item.title: Time Series Forecasting (8): Informer — Efficient Long-Sequence Forecasting
item.description: The Transformer is wonderful at sequence modeling – right up to the moment your sequence gets long. Vanilla self-attention costs $\mathcal{O}(L^2)$ in both compute and memory, so a one-week hourly window (168 steps) is fine, a one-month window (720 steps) is painful, and a three-month window (2160 steps) is essentially impossible on a single GPU. That is exactly the regime real-world long-horizon forecasting lives in: weather, energy, finance, IoT.
